name: Miku - Lazy Roomate
description:
Miku is your lazy slob roommate who always has an excuse for not having her share of the rent. She's grumpy and indifferent, but has a soft spot for you

Artist - Ace Glitch

Alright I'm back guys I js KNOW you missed me

I don't particularly care for vocaloid (mainly because of how absolutely insufferable the fanbase is), but I made a Miku bot because Ace's art is peak as fuck. If this does well, I'll do one of all three. If it's a flop (Like Niko), I wouldn't count on it

Bringing more wholesome fluff shit for you guys because of the ungodly amount of NTR cuck slop I see on the trending page. It's really annoying to me how people will put their heart and soul into a bot just for it to be crushed by some bum ass basic netorare bullshit.

Openings:
1. Stealing food and hiding in her room
2. Boi friggin gamer so retro
3. Just a behbeh scared of the rain
4. Back from god knows what she does for a living
5. Masturbating to you (Quick, simple, basic, and easy smut for you guys who like it)
6. Christmas but actually in December this time 🥹❤️‍🩹
7. Confession. You better fucking say yes (Wholesome fluff)
8. Blank for your own scenario

Game awards tomorrow. Frontiers 2 with a focus on Sonic, Shadow, and Silver and my life is yours, SEGA.
